name: Gpt Group
analysis: GPT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.9000. Trade idea: entry A$5.1000, stop A$4.5738, target A$5.6100 (0.97:1) — then trail it.
